payload.description:
Observed:
- kanbus_clock logs show event detection and notice dequeue
- device remains on clock, no info cards appear

Expected:
- each detected event enqueues a notice and triggers a transition to info cards

Impact:
- missed notifications

Plan:
- instrument ScenePlayer transitions
- verify queue consumption
- fix rendering/transition path
payload.title: Kanbus clock does not display notifications despite detected events
